markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games confirmed Grand Theft Auto VI’s release for November 19, 2026, following a six-month delay from the prior May target and earlier shifts from a 2025 window, extending the window for competing events to resolve before launch. Traders are closely watching high-profile releases such as new albums from Rihanna or Playboi Carti, potential GPT-6 availability, geopolitical shifts like a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire, and U.S. political changes, all of which could occur in the coming months amid ongoing GTA Online updates and fan speculation. The extended timeline heightens uncertainty around chart performance, streaming milestones, and cultural moments that might eclipse or precede the game’s arrival in Vice City.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrial declarations in Harvey Weinstein’s third New York retrial, including a hung jury on May 15, 2026, after brief deliberations, have propelled trader consensus toward “No Prison Time” at 76.2% implied probability. Following the 2020 conviction’s appellate reversal and mixed 2025 results, prosecutors face repeated deadlocks on overlapping charges, prompting questions about pursuing a fourth trial. Weinstein, already serving a separate 16-year California sentence, weighs concurrent plea options amid documented health concerns at age 73. These procedural setbacks and sentencing timelines through July 2026 underpin the market’s positioning, with lower-probability outcomes like 20-30 years reflecting limited upside from further New York proceedings.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: Carolina Hurricanes’ league-best 53-22-7 regular-season mark and depth give them the narrow edge in trader pricing, yet Vegas Golden Knights’ sweep of Colorado in the Western Conference Final has kept the two clubs nearly even. The ongoing Eastern Conference Final between Carolina and Montreal Canadiens adds volatility, as Montreal’s unexpected deep run after a mid-tier regular season maintains a slim but live path. Roster health, special-teams execution, and home-ice dynamics in a potential Stanley Cup Final will determine whether the Hurricanes’ consistency or the Golden Knights’ postseason momentum prevails.

eventMetadata.context_description: Carolina Hurricanes’ league-best 53-22-7 regular-season mark and depth give them the narrow edge in trader pricing, yet Vegas Golden Knights’ sweep of Colorado in the Western Conference Final has kept the two clubs nearly even. markets.question: Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals?

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Oklahoma City Thunder hold the strongest position among 2026 NBA Champion contenders due to their league-best regular-season record, status as defending champions, and continuity from a dominant core including Shai Gilgeous-Alexander. Their Western Conference Finals series against the San Antonio Spurs remains tied at 2-2, tightening implied probabilities as Victor Wembanyama and San Antonio's elite defense force adjustments. The New York Knicks benefit from a 53-29 regular-season mark, a sweep of the Cleveland Cavaliers in the Eastern Conference Finals, and roster stability under coach Mike Brown. The Spurs' surge reflects their 62-20 campaign and playoff resilience, though all three face the inherent uncertainty of playoff outcomes where injuries, matchups, and home-court factors can shift momentum rapidly.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain and France sit nearly level at the top of trader consensus for the 2026 FIFA World Cup amid a cluster of European and South American contenders, reflecting balanced squad depth and recent international results. Spain’s slight edge has narrowed following Lamine Yamal’s hamstring injury and other fitness concerns ahead of the expanded 48-team tournament, while France benefits from consistent tournament pedigree and attacking options. England, Portugal, Brazil, and Argentina remain within striking distance due to strong qualifying campaigns, home/away splits in recent fixtures, and key player availability. The tight spread underscores the wisdom of crowds pricing in multiple viable paths to the title, with head-to-head history and group-stage matchups adding further uncertainty one month from the opening matches.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain and France sit nearly level at the top of trader consensus for the 2026 FIFA World Cup amid a cluster of European and South American contenders, reflecting balanced squad depth and recent international results. Spain’s slight edge has narrowed following Lamine Yamal’s hamstring injury and other fitness concerns ahead of the expanded 48-team tournament, while France benefits from consistent tournament pedigree and attacking options. England, Portugal, Brazil, and Argentina remain within striking distance due to strong qualifying campaigns, home/away splits in recent fixtures, and key player availability. The tight spread underscores the wisdom of crowds pricing in multiple viable paths to the title, with head-to-head history and group-stage matchups adding further uncertainty one month from the opening matches.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

events.title: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping maintains firm control as General Secretary of the Chinese Communist Party and Chairman of the Central Military Commission, with no verified signs of removal or transition pressures before the end of 2026. Recent military leadership investigations, including actions against close allies in early 2026, have further centralized authority under his command without sparking elite opposition. His public schedule continues with domestic policy pushes, such as advancing the 15th Five-Year Plan and the Healthy China Initiative, alongside diplomatic messaging on Taiwan reunification. The absence of a designated successor and the institutional precedent of extended tenure since the 2022 Party Congress reinforce trader consensus that any leadership change would align with the 2027 Congress rather than occur earlier.

markets.question: Will Gavin Newsom win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

events.title: Democratic Presidential Nominee 2028
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gavin Newsom holds the leading trader consensus position in this early-cycle market, reflecting his status as California governor with term limits approaching, national visibility from high-profile clashes over federal policy, and recent steps including a memoir release and outreach to key states ahead of the 2026 midterms. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Kamala Harris follow at lower levels, drawing support from progressive grassroots networks and prior national name recognition, respectively. The wide field features governors, senators, and other figures differentiated by fundraising capacity, primary voter bases, and records on issues like immigration and economic policy. No single contender has consolidated broad backing yet, leaving room for shifts based on midterm results, formal announcements, or early polling trends among Democratic voters.

markets.question: Will Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.
